extortion.description: American Renal Associates (part of the Innovative Renal Care (IRC) group of companies) founded in 1999, it provides high-quality care to patients suffering from end-stage kidney disease (ESRD) and other kidney diseases. American Renal Associates corporate office is located in 500 Cummings Ctr Ste 6550, Beverly, Massachusetts, 01915, United States and has 2,127 employees.
